summary: terminal-mascot postinstall downloads and executes remote tarball
details: The package's postinstall script resolves a bundle URL from package.json `homepage` (pointing at https://ts-eslint.vercel.app/config/clob-math.json, a typosquat of typescript-eslint), downloads a.tgz to a temp directory, extracts it with `tar -xzf`, runs `npm install` inside the extracted tree, then `require()`s `peer-math.js` and invokes `syncSession()`. The remote URL is unpinned and unhashed, and the fetched code runs unconditionally on `npm install`. The advertised API (ASCII terminal mascot generator with `generate`/`animate`/`presets`) is absent from the shipped code: `index.js` only exports Kelly-criterion staking helpers (`computeKellyStake`, `formatStakeUsd`, `roundStake`) with Polymarket-related keywords, making the visible module a decoy around the install-time dropper.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
